channel.title: Z-Stream Notifications
channel.description: Site updates and important notifications for Z-Stream users

item.title: Windows & Android apps are out!
item.description:
Z-Stream now has native Windows and Android apps.
JOIN OUR DISCORD SERVER to grab the download links! Link below.

item.title: We've rebranded — welcome to zstream.mov!
item.description:
xP-Stream is now Z-Stream. Our new domain is live at https://zstream.mov
Update your bookmarks!
JOIN OUR DISCORD SERVER for support, updates, and to be part of the community! Link below.
